fields.name: Jane Eyre
fields.description: Helping you discover a signature style that elevates your confidence and perfectly aligns with your lifestyle.

fields.name: Aemma Arryn
fields.description: Dedicated to making you look and feel your absolute best. From soft, glowing skin to dramatic transformations, I specialize in bespoke makeup artistry for any occasion. Let's create your perfect look.

fields.name: Agnes MacKenzie
fields.description: A stylist specializing in classic, bohemian, glamorous, and romantic fashion aesthetics. Creates personalized looks that combine elegance, femininity, and individuality for both everyday wear and special occasions. Passionate about helping clients express their personality through refined style choices.

fields.name: Oleksandra Golub
fields.description: A professional hairstylist specializing in haircuts, coloring, styling, and hair care treatments. Dedicated to creating modern, personalized looks that enhance each client’s natural beauty and confidence.

author: lady.linton@gmail.com
fields.comment: Jane helped me to develop my style from zero, she is great! I especially recommend her to those who try to adapt vintage style in modern life

author: miastone@ukr.net
fields.comment: Finest maakeup artist I've ever known
